raw.subject: Your Chaparral Pet Care page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your post about Ally Harrison Greenleaf's birthday really stood out to me. It's clear you have a special team that truly cares about the pets in your community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential clients with unanswered questions about your services and hours.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea from your Facebook photos and posts, highlighting services you offer, a photo gallery of the adventures you've had, and a clear contact section so people can get in touch.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/grants-pawtastic-pet-care-chaparral

I'd love to discuss how a simple website could help you connect with more pet owners in the area. Let's chat more about the details of a straightforward project for local businesses.
